gaps.description: Invocation grants and composition rules need the concrete evaluation, release, draft, transcript, and suggestion object families from 404-409.
gaps.releaseImpact: Blocks 410 and later live admission controls.

gaps.description: Trust envelope projection cannot be authoritative until invocation grants, kill-switch state, release state, and run settlement exist.
Insertion leases require suggestion action records plus current surface and trust envelopes.
Feedback eligibility needs final human artifacts, action leases, and the 404 eligibility law.
gaps.releaseImpact: Blocks training eligibility and override trail publication.

gaps.description: Replayable inference logs and trainability flags should wait until replay harness and feedback chain identity exist.
gaps.releaseImpact: Does not block 404-409; blocks mature monitoring and Phase 9 evidence.

gaps.description: Drift and fairness monitoring needs real shadow evidence, inference evidence, and metric families.
gaps.releaseImpact: Does not block first-wave implementation; blocks rollout promotion.

gaps.description: Freeze disposition needs control-plane, trust-envelope, and monitoring inputs.
Regulatory evidence automation needs candidate law, inference evidence, and freeze disposition.
gaps.releaseImpact: Blocks automated DTAC, DCB, RFC evidence pipeline.

gaps.description: Side-panel presentation needs authoritative render posture and same-shell trust envelopes.
Diffable draft and insert controls need real draft artifacts and insertion leases.
Confidence and provenance components should wait for envelope and monitoring inputs.
gaps.releaseImpact: Does not block first-wave backend work; blocks polished visible provenance.

gaps.description: Clinician-edit trail must bind to authoritative feedback chain and final human artifacts.
